product_overview: JobAlign is an AI-powered job matching platform that efficiently connects job seekers and recruiters using intelligent algorithms and AI-driven insights. It facilitates resume analysis, personalized job recommendations, and detailed candidate-job matching to streamline the hiring and job search processes.
core_goals: Connect job seekers with relevant employment opportunities using AI-enhanced matching.
Enable recruiters to discover qualified candidates efficiently through AI-driven analysis.
Leverage AI to improve the accuracy and relevance of job and candidate matches.
Provide actionable career insights and guidance to job seekers.
Ensure secure, role-based access control and a seamless user experience for all users.
key_features: Robust authentication and authorization with email/password registration, JWT, and role-based access.
Job management for recruiters to post, edit, close, and analyze jobs with AI-driven requirement extraction.
Job seeker features including job browsing with filters, applying for jobs, saving favorites, and tracking applications.
AI-powered resume upload, parsing, and analysis extracting education, skills, experience, certifications, and more.
Detailed AI-powered candidate-job matching with scoring and matching summaries.
AI assistant providing job search help, interview tips, resume reviews, and personalized recommendations.
Company profile management for recruiters to create, edit, and associate jobs with companies.
Comprehensive user profile management including profile editing and password changes.
user_flow_summary: Job Seeker flow: Register/login, upload resume for AI analysis, browse and filter jobs, view details, apply, receive AI matching insights, track applications.
Recruiter flow: Register/login, create company profile, post jobs with AI job description analysis, view applicants, analyze candidate matches with detailed scores, and monitor job analytics.
Password reset flow: Initiate forgot password via email, receive reset link, reset password securely, and update credentials.
validation_criteria: Users must be able to register, login, and maintain authenticated sessions with JWT tokens.
Job seekers can browse, filter, save, and successfully apply for jobs.
Resume uploads and AI-powered parsing must extract detailed candidate information correctly.
Recruiters can create, update, and close job postings and manage applicant pipelines.
AI matching provides consistent, accurate scoring across job applications.
Role-based access control and route protection work correctly on frontend and backend.
All API endpoints respond correctly and securely under load.
Password reset functionality operates securely with proper email workflows.
Performance criteria are met: page loads under 3 seconds, API latency under 2 seconds, resume and AI processing timely.
The application adheres to security best practices including data validation, authentication, and authorization.

code_summary.description: An AI-powered job matching platform connecting job seekers with recruiters, featuring intelligent candidate-job matching, resume analysis, and AI assistant capabilities.

frontend.other: JWT Decode, Sentry for error tracking, Firebase

authentication.security: bcryptjs password hashing, JWT tokens with refresh tokens, Role-based access control

job_seeker_features: Upload and parse resumes (PDF, DOC, DOCX)
AI assistant for job search help
recruiter_features: Analyze candidate applications with detailed matching scores
ai_features: Resume parsing and analysis (degree, experience, skills, certificates, responsibilities)
Job posting analysis to extract requirements
Candidate-job matching with detailed scoring (degree, experience, technical skills, responsibilities, certificates, soft skills)
AI assistant for job seekers (job search help, interview tips, resume review)

key_services.JobAnalysis: Analyzes job descriptions to extract requirements using AI
key_services.ResumeAnalysis: Parses and analyzes resumes to extract candidate qualifications
key_services.MatchingAnalysis: Compares candidate profiles with job requirements and provides detailed matching scores
key_services.AIAssistant: Provides job search assistance, interview tips, and resume reviews using AI
key_services.EmailService: Handles password reset emails and other notifications
